mapper.insert: INSERT INTO mcp_protocol_registry (gateway_id, tool_id, tool_name, tool_type, tool_description, tool_version, http_url, http_method, http_headers, timeout, retry_times, status) VALUES (#{gatewayId}, #{toolId}, #{toolName}, #{toolType}, #{toolDescription}, #{toolVersion}, #{httpUrl}, #{httpMethod}, #{httpHeaders}, #{timeout}, #{retryTimes}, #{status})
mapper.update: UPDATE mcp_protocol_registry SET gateway_id = #{gatewayId}, tool_id = #{toolId}, tool_name = #{toolName}, tool_type = #{toolType}, tool_description = #{toolDescription}, tool_version = #{toolVersion}, http_url = #{httpUrl}, http_method = #{httpMethod}, http_headers = #{httpHeaders}, timeout = #{timeout}, retry_times = #{retryTimes}, status = #{status}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT id, gateway_id, tool_id, tool_name, tool_type, tool_description, tool_version, http_url, http_method, http_headers, timeout, retry_times, status, create_time, update_time FROM mcp_protocol_registry ORDER BY id DESC
